mapper.sql: id, caipiao_name, caipiao_type, caipiao_code, open_date, blue, red_one, red_two, red_three, red_four, red_five, red_six, is_use, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO `caipiao` (caipiao_name, caipiao_type, caipiao_code, open_date, blue, red_one, red_two, red_three, red_four, red_five, red_six) VALUES
(#{caiPiao.caiPiaoName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{caiPiao.caiPiaoType, jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{caiPiao.caiPiaoCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{caiPiao.openDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{caiPiao.blue, jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{caiPiao.redOne, jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{caiPiao.redTwo, jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{caiPiao.redThree, jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{caiPiao.redFour, jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{caiPiao.redFive, jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{caiPiao.redSix, jdbcType=TINYINT})
